content.query:
IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.external_file_formats WHERE name = 'SynapseDelimitedTextFormat') 
	CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT [SynapseDelimitedTextFormat] 
	WITH ( FORMAT_TYPE = DELIMITEDTEXT ,
	       FORMAT_OPTIONS (
			 FIELD_TERMINATOR = ',',
			 FIRST_ROW = 11,
			 USE_TYPE_DEFAULT = FALSE
			))
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.external_data_sources WHERE name = 'synapse-container_sarmastorage_dfs_core_windows_net') 
	CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE [synapse-container_sarmastorage_dfs_core_windows_net] 
	WITH (
		LOCATION = 'abfss://synapse-container@sarmastorage.dfs.core.windows.net' 
	)
GO

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE dbo.sales (
	[sale_id] nvarchar(4000),
	[sale_date] date,
	[year] bigint,
	[quarter] nvarchar(4000),
	[month] nvarchar(4000),
	[country] nvarchar(4000),
	[region] nvarchar(4000),
	[city] nvarchar(4000),
	[product_name] nvarchar(4000),
	[category] nvarchar(4000),
	[storage] nvarchar(4000),
	[color] nvarchar(4000),
	[unit_price_usd] float,
	[discount_pct] bigint,
	[units_sold] bigint,
	[discounted_price_usd] float,
	[revenue_usd] float,
	[currency] nvarchar(4000),
	[fx_rate_to_usd] float,
	[revenue_local_currency] float,
	[sales_channel] nvarchar(4000),
	[payment_method] nvarchar(4000),
	[customer_segment] nvarchar(4000),
	[customer_age_group] nvarchar(4000),
	[previous_device_os] nvarchar(4000),
	[customer_rating] float,
	[return_status] nvarchar(4000)
	)
	WITH (
	LOCATION = 'apple_global_sales_dataset.csv',
	DATA_SOURCE = [synapse-container_sarmastorage_dfs_core_windows_net],
	FILE_FORMAT = [SynapseDelimitedTextFormat]
	)
GO


SELECT TOP 100 * FROM dbo.sales
GO
